headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 23 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 23 airports right now. Engine anti-ice operations are flagged at Shirak (LWN/UDSG). Across base airports: 6 critical, 14 high, 10 medium, 9 normal. Key bases needing attention include London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK), Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) and Chişinău (RMO/LUKK); plus 17 other bases. 10 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, mist and low cloud base  — most notably around London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK), Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD) and Craiova (CRA/LRCV). Network hotspots: Shirak (LWN/UDSG), Malta (MLA/LMML), Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Hamburg Helmut Schmidt (HAM/EDDH), London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) and 18 others. Primary drivers: RVR limitations, very low visibility and low cloud base. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by Shirak (LWN/UDSG), Hamburg Helmut Schmidt (HAM/EDDH), Leeds Bradford (LBA/EGNM) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 23 airports right now. Base airports (focus): London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) — CRIT: mist; snow; visibility down to 2 km, cloud base around 400 ft | Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) — HIGH: mist; strong gusts risk | Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 400 m, cloud base around 200 ft | Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT) — HIGH: mist; visibility down to 2.5 km, cloud base around 900 ft | Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 150 m, cloud base around 100 ft; forecast below approach minima at times | Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD) — CRIT: freezing fog; snow; runway contamination risk and 14 others. Worst affected now: Shirak (LWN/UDSG) — CRIT: freezing fog; snow; freezing precipitation / icing risk (drivers: engine anti-ice operations, low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), low-visibility takeoff restrictions) | Malta (MLA/LMML) — CRIT: strong gusts risk (drivers: thunderstorm/convective risk) | Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB) — CRIT: mist; snow; strong gusts risk (drivers: low ceilings, thunderstorm/convective risk, mist) | Hamburg Helmut Schmidt (HAM/EDDH) — CRIT: snow; visibility down to 1.4 km, cloud base around 300 ft (drivers: low ceilings, snow/blowing snow) | London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) — CRIT: mist; snow; visibility down to 2 km, cloud base around 400 ft (drivers: low ceilings, mist, snow/blowing snow) | Leeds Bradford (LBA/EGNM) — CRIT: freezing fog; snow; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 0 ft (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) and 17 others. Changed since last run: Shirak (LWN/UDSG), Hamburg Helmut Schmidt (HAM/EDDH), Leeds Bradford (LBA/EGNM), Ålesund Airport, Vigra (AES/ENAL), Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Solidarity Szczecin–Goleniów (SZZ/EPSC), Kaunas (KUN/EYKA), Vilnius (VNO/EYVI), Alicante-Elche Miguel Hernández (ALC/LEAL), Lamezia Terme Sant'Eufemia (SUF/LICA) and 2 others.
